title: Privacy & Consent
subtitle: Manage your data privacy preferences

privacy_policy.label: Privacy Policy
privacy_policy.description: Accept the privacy policy to use the application. This is required for access.

ai_analysis.label: AI Analysis
ai_analysis.description: Allow AI to analyze your health data for diagnostic assistance and recommendations.

audio.label: Audio Recording
audio.description: Allow audio recording during consultations for transcription and documentation.

marketing.label: Marketing Communications
marketing.description: Receive marketing communications, newsletters, and promotional updates.

saved: Your consent preferences have been saved successfully.
error: Failed to save consent preferences. Please log out and try again
privacyWarning: Revoking the privacy policy will block access to the application.

privacy.intro: Ebovir Biotech ("Ebovir", "we", "us", or "our") is committed to protecting personal information in accordance with Quebec Law 25 and other applicable Canadian privacy laws.
scopeItems: Name, date of birth, and contact information
Medical and genetic data (with explicit consent)
purposeItems: Deliver AI-assisted medical and genetic services
Maintain account security and prevent unauthorized access
Comply with legal and regulatory obligations
Conduct consented research and quality improvement
retentionItems: Encryption in transit (TLS) and at rest
Cross-border transfers assessed per Quebec Law 25
privacy.crossBorderText: Your information may be processed by authorized cloud and AI service providers located outside Quebec (including Canada and the United States), subject to contractual and technical safeguards.
privacy.contactText: For privacy inquiries, contact our Privacy Officer Zhenlong Liu at ebovirit@gmail.com, or by mail at 117-500 boulevard Cartier Ouest, Laval, Québec, Canada, H7V 5B7.

ai.intro: Our platform uses artificial intelligence to analyze medical and genetic information. By enabling this consent, you allow us to process your health data through AI systems.
whatItems: Automated analysis of medical history and symptoms
Genetic data interpretation and risk assessment
Pattern recognition across your health records
limitsItems: AI outputs are not medical diagnoses
Results do not replace licensed healthcare professionals
All AI outputs should be reviewed by a qualified clinician
You may request access to AI-generated information at any time
ai.dataText: Your health data is processed securely using encrypted channels. Data is not shared with third parties for AI training purposes. You can withdraw this consent at any time without affecting your core access to the platform.
ai.noStorageText: Conversation messages you exchange with our AI assistant (EboAI) are never stored on our servers. Each session is stateless — once the conversation ends, your messages are gone. Only AI-generated summaries, which are explicitly saved at the request of you or your clinician, are retained in your record and can be deleted at any time from Account Settings.

audio.intro: With your consent, audio may be recorded during consultations to support transcription and clinical documentation.
whatItems: Dictation input for clinical note generation
Transcription output linked to your patient record
audio.storageText: Audio recordings are encrypted at rest and in transit. Access is restricted to authorized clinicians and system processes. Recordings are retained according to our data retention policy and applicable regulations.
controlItems: You can disable audio recording at any time via this setting
You may request deletion of existing recordings
Disabling this does not affect other platform features

marketing.intro: We may send you communications about our services, new features, health tips, and related offerings.
whatItems: Product updates and new feature announcements
marketing.optOutText: You can withdraw marketing consent at any time by toggling this setting off or by clicking the unsubscribe link in any marketing email. Opting out of marketing does not affect service-related communications (such as security alerts or account notifications).
